---
title: "Claims"
---

## Main Hypothesis

> **H0 (null)**: The proposed method performs no better than [strongest baseline] on [metric] under [conditions].
>
> **H1 (alternative)**: The proposed method statistically significantly outperforms [strongest baseline] by at least [δ] on [metric].

- Decision threshold: p < 0.05 (two-tailed), effect size ≥ [δ]
- Test: [paired t-test / Wilcoxon signed-rank / bootstrap CI]

```{dot}
//| label: fig-hypothesis
//| fig-cap: "Hypothesis structure: null vs. alternative"
//| fig-width: 7
//| fig-height: 2.8
digraph G {
  bgcolor="transparent"
  rankdir=TB
  graph [ranksep=0.52, nodesep=0.55]
  node [style=filled, fillcolor="#2c3035", color="#4a9eda",
        fontcolor="#f8f9fa", fontname="Arial", fontsize=11,
        shape=box, width=1.6, height=0.42]
  edge [color="#6c757d", penwidth=1.4]

  subgraph row1 {
    rank=same
    Null [label="Null H0", fillcolor="#4a2040", color="#e74c3c"]
    Alt  [label="Alt H1", fillcolor="#1a4a3a", color="#00bc8c"]
  }
  subgraph row2 {
    rank=same
    Test [label="Statistical Test", fillcolor="#375a7f"]
  }
  subgraph row3 {
    rank=same
    Reject [label="Reject H0", fillcolor="#1a4a3a", color="#00bc8c"]
    Fail   [label="Fail to Reject", fillcolor="#4a2040", color="#e74c3c"]
    Revise [label="Revise Claim"]
  }

  Null -> Test  Alt -> Test
  Test -> Reject  Test -> Fail
  Fail -> Revise
}
```

---

## Supporting Claims

Each claim below is independently testable and maps to a specific experiment.

- **Claim 1**: [specific, measurable statement — e.g., "Component X improves F1 by ≥ 2pp"]
  - Evidence needed: ablation removing Component X
  - Falsification: F1 delta < 2pp in ablation
- **Claim 2**: [specific, measurable statement]
  - Evidence needed: [experiment type]
  - Falsification: [condition that disproves]
- **Claim 3**: [specific, measurable statement]
  - Evidence needed: [experiment type]
  - Falsification: [condition that disproves]

```{dot}
//| label: fig-claims
//| fig-cap: "Claim → experiment → evidence chain"
//| fig-width: 7
//| fig-height: 3.5
digraph G {
  bgcolor="transparent"
  rankdir=TB
  graph [ranksep=0.52, nodesep=0.5]
  node [style=filled, fillcolor="#2c3035", color="#4a9eda",
        fontcolor="#f8f9fa", fontname="Arial", fontsize=11,
        shape=box, width=1.6, height=0.42]
  edge [color="#6c757d", penwidth=1.4]

  subgraph row1 {
    rank=same
    C1 [label="Claim 1", fillcolor="#375a7f"]
    C2 [label="Claim 2", fillcolor="#375a7f"]
    C3 [label="Claim 3", fillcolor="#375a7f"]
  }
  subgraph row2 {
    rank=same
    X1 [label="Main Expt"]
    X2 [label="Ablation"]
    X3 [label="HP Search"]
  }
  subgraph row3 {
    rank=same
    E1 [label="Evidence 1", fillcolor="#1a4a3a", color="#00bc8c"]
    E2 [label="Evidence 2", fillcolor="#1a4a3a", color="#00bc8c"]
    E3 [label="Evidence 3", fillcolor="#1a4a3a", color="#00bc8c"]
  }
  subgraph row4 {
    rank=same
    V [label="Validated", fillcolor="#1a4a3a", color="#00bc8c", width=5.0]
  }

  C1 -> X1  C2 -> X2  C3 -> X3
  X1 -> E1  X2 -> E2  X3 -> E3
  E1 -> V  E2 -> V  E3 -> V
}
```

---

## Assumptions and Risks

- **Assumption A**: [e.g., data is i.i.d.] — risk: if violated, Claim 1 may not hold
- **Assumption B**: [e.g., single-GPU training suffices] — risk: may affect reproducibility
- **Assumption C**: [e.g., train/test domains are aligned] — risk: distribution shift

```{dot}
//| label: fig-risks
//| fig-cap: "Assumption → risk → mitigation"
//| fig-width: 7
//| fig-height: 2.8
digraph G {
  bgcolor="transparent"
  rankdir=LR
  graph [ranksep=0.6, nodesep=0.45]
  node [style=filled, fillcolor="#2c3035", color="#4a9eda",
        fontcolor="#f8f9fa", fontname="Arial", fontsize=11,
        shape=box, width=1.55, height=0.42]
  edge [color="#6c757d", penwidth=1.4]

  subgraph col1 {
    rank=same
    A1 [label="Assumption A", fillcolor="#375a7f"]
    A2 [label="Assumption B", fillcolor="#375a7f"]
    A3 [label="Assumption C", fillcolor="#375a7f"]
  }
  subgraph col2 {
    rank=same
    R1 [label="Risk 1", fillcolor="#4a2040", color="#e74c3c"]
    R2 [label="Risk 2", fillcolor="#4a2040", color="#e74c3c"]
    R3 [label="Risk 3", fillcolor="#4a2040", color="#e74c3c"]
  }
  subgraph col3 {
    rank=same
    M1 [label="Mitigation 1", fillcolor="#1a4a3a", color="#00bc8c"]
    M2 [label="Mitigation 2", fillcolor="#1a4a3a", color="#00bc8c"]
    M3 [label="Mitigation 3", fillcolor="#1a4a3a", color="#00bc8c"]
  }

  A1 -> R1 -> M1
  A2 -> R2 -> M2
  A3 -> R3 -> M3
}
```

---

## Claim Status Tracker

| Claim | Experiment | Status | Notes |
|-------|-----------|--------|-------|
| Claim 1 | Main experiment | ⬜ Pending | — |
| Claim 2 | Ablation | ⬜ Pending | — |
| Claim 3 | HP search | ⬜ Pending | — |

> Update status: ⬜ Pending → 🔄 Running → ✅ Confirmed / ❌ Refuted
